response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a highly accomplished Staff/Senior Software Engineer with roughly 15+ years of professional experience, which represents a severe mismatch with this entry-level to mid-level position. While he satisfies virtually every technical requirement (TypeScript, REST APIs, React, AWS, Kubernetes, LLM/AI tooling) and is Berlin-based, the role explicitly targets candidates with 'first to several years' of experience. Hiring this candidate would almost certainly result in rapid attrition once more appropriate opportunities arise, and his compensation expectations would likely far exceed the budget for a junior/mid role. The technical fit is not in question — the seniority mismatch is.
strengths: Extensive TypeScript and full-stack expertise across multiple production environments (Optilyz, re:cinq, RIDE Capital)
Covers nearly all nice-to-have qualifications: LLM/AI agent tooling, AWS CDK, and Kubernetes cluster deployments
Berlin-based, satisfying the high on-site presence requirement with no relocation friction
concerns: Severely overqualified at Staff/Senior level with 15+ years of experience for a role explicitly scoped to entry-to-mid level
No explicit mention of PostgreSQL (primary DB listed is MongoDB and MySQL) or Nest.js, which are preferred stack items
Salary expectations and career trajectory are almost certainly misaligned with a junior/mid individual contributor budget and scope
